summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TUDOaqui GPS Tracking & Rides features. All 15 features tested successfully. Backend: 100% working - WebSocket status, ride estimate, auth login/verify-otp, driver online/location, ride request/accept/start/finish, GPS tracking endpoints all functional. WebSocket connections for both driver and client working with location persistence to DB.
critical_code_review_comments: GPS tracking persistence via WebSocket working correctly - location_update messages persist to ride_tracking table when ride_id is provided
REST tracking endpoints (GET/POST /{ride_id}/tracking) working as fallback for WebSocket
Driver must be 'aprovado' status before going online - proper validation in place
Ride flow properly validates state transitions (solicitada -> aceite -> em_curso -> finalizada)
WebSocket manager properly handles connection/disconnection and ride groups

success_rate.frontend: 100% - App loads correctly with login page

test_credentials.otp_retrieval: su - postgres -c "psql -d tudoaqui -t -A -c \"SELECT codigo FROM otp_codes WHERE telefone='<PHONE>' AND verificado=false ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;\""

ride_estimate.notes: Requires origem/destino with latitude, longitude, endereco (min 5 chars)

auth_login.notes: Sends OTP via Africa's Talking sandbox, stored in DB

driver_online_toggle.notes: Requires motorista role and approved driver status

driver_location_update.notes: Requires driver to be online first

pending_rides_nearby.notes: Requires latitude/longitude query params, motorista role

ride_accept.notes: Changes status to 'aceite', requires online driver

get_tracking.notes: Returns ride_id and array of tracking points

post_tracking.notes: REST fallback for WebSocket, requires motorista role

websocket_driver.notes: Accepts connection, handles ping/pong, location_update persists to DB

tracking_data_verified.persistence_via_websocket: VERIFIED - location_update with ride_id persists to DB

seed_data_creation: Driver profile created for admin user +244912000000 with id 7b73672d-708d-41b3-9c7b-ab4ba2f8099a, status approved
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPS tracking and rides fully functional. Admin +244912000000 has approved driver profile. Test ride 9b47196d-5d07-4f25-840c-e46a7cecbcfc completed with 5 tracking points. WebSocket endpoints at /api/v1/ws/driver/{token} and /api/v1/ws/client/{token}. Rate limiter active (5 min cooldown for OTP). Driver must be approved before going online.

mocked_apis.sms_provider: Africa's Talking is in SANDBOX mode - OTPs are stored in PostgreSQL otp_codes table instead of being sent via real SMS
